name: construction contractors managing 5-15 sites/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-15 sites/month, inefficient log consolidation causes compliance risks. We automate the consolidation of safety logs instead of manual log consolidation and reporting.
problem_solved: Inefficient consolidation of safety logs leading to compliance risks.
